options.name: -assigned
options.description: Copy the bumps with assigned signals

options.name: -bumps
options.description: Specifies names of bumps to be copied

options.name: -name_format
options.description: Specifies the name format for the target bumps

options.name: -shift
options.description: Specifies the distance in microns from the source location to the target location in X/Y direction
